reply_original: I understand your frustration. High-quality AI requires significant server costs, but we want everyone to enjoy Fantasia. You can actually earn free messages by completing daily tasks in the Mission Center (Shop page -> Task icon). For any questions or feedback, please contact us at support@fantachat.ai. We are always here to help!
reply_zh: 我理解您的沮丧。高质量的AI需要高昂的服务器成本，但我们希望每个人都能享受Fantasia。实际上，您可以通过在任务中心（商店页面 -> 任务图标）完成每日任务来获取免费消息。如有任何问题或反馈，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。我们随时为您提供帮助！
